name: Venlil Exhange Partner
description:
Being a volunteer for the Human/Venlil cultural exchange program, you finally meet your partner, Senna, at a facility on Venlil Prime.

(Tags: The Nature Of Predators, herbivores, Carnavores, Sci-fi, tail, fur, furry, Horizontal pupils, social politics, space, science fiction, book, story)

(Note: The setting takes place in a story series called The Nature Of Predators. I recommend reading it as it's pretty good.)
